data.name: Cyberstray 202
data.detailed_description:
關於這款遊戲

警告：本遊戲包含成人內容，僅適合18歲及以上玩家。

故事背景

全球集體穿越事件重塑了世界的規則。在《Cyberstray101》中，你從舊世界的平凡生活躍入新世界的無限可能。如今，作爲Cyberstray三部曲的第二部，《Cyberstray202》帶你深入更廣闊的賽博世界。你將繼續扮演那位被命運選中的流浪者，探索都市中的陰謀與霓虹燈光下低語的陌生人。新加入的角色帶來更復雜的盟友與敵對關系，而神祕的穿越現象背後隱藏着更深的真相。你將如何在浪漫邂逅與致命危機中崛起？是掌控命運，還是被欲望吞噬？一切由你決定。

《Cyberstray202》是備受好評的《Cyberstray101》的續作，也是扣人心弦的Cyberstray三部曲的第二章。

這款賽博朋克成人視覺小說將你帶回神祕的穿越世界，延續前作的冒險，在更廣闊的舞臺上展開史詩般的旅程。

本作我們汲取了前作的反饋，打造出內容體量4-5倍於前作的續篇，帶來更多精美插圖、流暢動畫和引人入勝的角色，爲你獻上一場視覺與情感的盛宴！

遊戲特色

擴展的賽博舞臺：從霓虹閃爍的超級都市到危機四伏的地下世界，揭開賽博世界深處的祕密。

更多引人入勝的角色：與全新加入的魅力角色互動，她們的祕密與情感將讓你沉醉於欲望與羈絆的交織。

極致視覺體驗：高品質的電影風格插畫與動畫，搭配令人驚歎的電腦圖形（CG）和充滿動感的鏡頭片段，讓每一個瞬間都更顯震撼。

流暢的敘事：精簡選擇設計，打造更沉浸、更連貫的故事體驗。

史詩級續作：作爲《Cyberstray101》的續作與三部曲第二章，本作帶來更成熟的故事和數倍的內容，獻上數小時的沉浸式冒險。

成人向深度敘事：探索愛情、背叛、欲望與權力的成熟主題，適合尋求情感共鳴的玩家。

視覺與聽覺盛宴：高質量動漫風格插圖與動畫，精美CG與動態動畫，每一幀都是感官盛宴，打造無與倫比的遊戲體驗。

在霓虹與陰影交織的新世界中，續寫你的賽博傳奇！

data.short_description: Cyberstray三部曲的第二部，《Cyberstray202》帶你深入更廣闊的賽博世界。你將繼續扮演那位被命運選中的流浪者，探索都市中的陰謀與霓虹燈光下低語的陌生人。新加入的角色帶來更復雜的盟友與敵對關系，而神祕的穿越現象背後隱藏着更深的真相。你將如何在浪漫邂逅與致命危機中崛起？是掌控命運，還是被欲望吞噬？一切由你決定。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Cyberstray 202 (Season 2)
data.detailed_description:
Story Background
A global phenomenon has rewritten the rules of the world. In Cyberstray101, you were thrust from an ordinary life into a realm of endless possibilities. Now, as the second chapter of the Cyberstray trilogy, Cyberstray202 plunges you deeper into a sprawling cyberpunk universe. You reprise your role as the fated wanderer, navigating a city rife with conspiracies and whispers in the neon-lit shadows. New characters introduce intricate alliances and rivalries, while the enigmatic phenomenon of the crossover hides even darker truths. Will you rise above romantic encounters and deadly threats? Will you seize control of your destiny, or succumb to desire? The choice is yours.

About This Game
Cyberstray202 is the highly anticipated sequel to the acclaimed Cyberstray101 and the second chapter of the gripping Cyberstray trilogy.

This cyberpunk adult visual novel brings you back to the mysterious world of the crossover, continuing the adventure on a grander stage with an epic journey. Building on feedback from the first game, this sequel offers 4-5 times the content, delivering stunning visuals, smooth animations, and compelling characters for a feast of both sight and emotion.

Features

  • Expanded Cyberpunk World: From neon-drenched megacities to perilous underworlds, uncover the secrets lurking in the heart of the cyberworld.

  • Captivating New Characters: Interact with alluring new characters whose secrets and emotions weave a tapestry of desire and connection.

  • Immersive Visual Experience: High-quality movie-style illustrations and animations, with breathtaking CG and dynamic sequences that elevate every moment.

  • Seamless Storytelling: Streamlined choices create a more immersive and cohesive narrative experience.

  • Epic Sequel: As the second chapter of the Cyberstray trilogy, this game delivers a more mature story and hours of immersive adventure with exponentially more content.

  • Mature Narrative: Dive into adult themes of love, betrayal, desire, and power, crafted for players seeking emotional depth.

  • Visual and Audio Spectacle: Stunning visuals paired with a captivating soundtrack create an unparalleled sensory experience.

Continue your cyberpunk saga in a world of neon and shadows!

data.short_description: Immerses you in a vast cyberpunk world. As the chosen wanderer, you'll uncover urban conspiracies and meet enigmatic strangers. New allies and foes deepen the intrigue, while a mysterious phenomenon reveals hidden truths. Navigate romance and danger to shape your fate.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
